message:
fix(fj-lax): reject zero num_sections in Split to prevent divide-by-zero

Split with num_sections=0 triggered integer division by zero at line
3550 because Rust's is_multiple_of(0) returns true. Add explicit check
rejecting zero num_sections before divisibility logic.

Fixes: frankenjax-o205

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
